title: dactylorhiza islandica
intro: Dactylorhiza islandica, also known as the Icelandic orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to high-altitude and high-latitude areas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza islandica are thought to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Dactylorhiza islandica is often used as a powder or extract in capsules, tinctures, and teas, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
